header.name: Jivan Karlapudi
header.description: Computer Science student and full-stack developer focused on React frontends, Spring Boot APIs, clean UI, and reliable database-backed web applications.

footer.title: Interested in building something together?
footer.description: I enjoy turning practical ideas into responsive interfaces and maintainable backend services. Reach out for internships, junior full-stack roles, or project collaboration.

skills.title: Skills
skills.intro: A practical full-stack toolkit across frontend, backend, APIs, databases, and delivery.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work from frontend, backend, and full-stack learning projects.

codeMaster.name: Portfolio Website
codeMaster.description: A responsive portfolio built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS to present projects, skills, education, and contact details.

allaw.name: Instant Meaning Finder
allaw.description: A Chrome extension that displays word meanings instantly through a polished popup UI built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.I integrated a third-party dictionary API with the Fetch API, handled async loading and error states, and organized the extension UI with a modular component-style structure.

truthify.name: Store Management Web App
truthify.description: A responsive web application for managing product and student records with dynamic tables, forms, search filtering, and live CRUD updates.I built the frontend in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, consumed Spring Boot REST APIs with Axios, and focused on clean browser-side data flows.

legalConstat.name: Backend API Documentation
legalConstat.description: Postman-tested API request and response documentation to support smooth frontend integration.

smartflow.name: Spring Boot REST API System
smartflow.description: A backend support project centered on RESTful API design, request-response cycles, and clean endpoint contracts for frontend teams.I worked with Spring Boot, tested endpoints in Postman, documented formats, and strengthened my backend-aware frontend collaboration workflow.

decorNature.name: Responsive UI Layouts
decorNature.description: Reusable responsive page layouts built for mobile and desktop using semantic HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

aimoto.name: Java CRUD API
aimoto.description: A Spring Boot API using layered architecture for CRUD operations, validation, and database persistence with JPA and MySQL.The project strengthened my understanding of MVC architecture, SQL-backed services, and maintainable backend code.

liic.name: Git Collaboration Practice
liic.description: Team-based version control workflow using Git and GitHub while collaborating on frontend logic and API integration.

teslaApp.name: API Testing Workspace
teslaApp.description: A Postman workspace for validating REST endpoints, edge cases, request payloads, and response formats.

emmausConnect.name: Student Records Module
emmausConnect.description: CRUD screens and backend services for managing student records and operational data.

wilderGame.name: JavaScript UI Practice
wilderGame.description: Interactive browser UI exercises focused on DOM updates, forms, filtering, and responsive behavior.

legalDirectory.name: Database Integration
legalDirectory.description: MySQL-backed data persistence practice for Java and Spring Boot web applications.

timeline.title: Journey
timeline.intro: My education, project work, and growth as a full-stack developer.

experiences.company: GH Raisoni College of Engineering & Management, Pune
experiences.description: Building a strong computer science foundation through coursework, projects, and hands-on web development practice.
Created responsive, user-friendly interfaces with React, JavaScript ES6+, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Flexbox, and responsive design.
Built RESTful APIs with Java, Spring Boot, MVC architecture, JDBC, Hibernate/JPA, MySQL, Maven, and Postman API testing.
Developed a browser extension with a polished popup UI, dictionary API integration, async data handling, and clean error states.
Built dynamic tables, forms, search filtering, live CRUD updates, and Axios-based integration with Spring Boot REST endpoints.
Designed layered REST APIs, implemented CRUD operations, persisted data with JPA and MySQL, and documented endpoints for frontend use.

faq.title: Do you have any questions?
faq.intro: A quick look at how I work and what I am focused on.

items.question: What kind of role am I looking for?
items.answer: I am looking for internships, junior developer opportunities, and project collaborations where I can contribute across React frontend work and Java Spring Boot backend development.

items.question: What is my strongest technical focus?
items.answer: My focus is full-stack web development: responsive interfaces, REST API integration, Spring Boot services, MySQL persistence, and clean request-response workflows.

items.question: How do I approach frontend work?
items.answer: I build responsive, user-friendly interfaces with attention to clean layout, reusable structure, performance, and smooth API-driven data states.

items.question: How do I approach backend work?
items.answer: I design clear REST endpoints, test them with Postman, use layered Spring Boot architecture, and keep database operations understandable and maintainable.

items.question: What makes my profile useful to a team?
items.answer: I bring frontend skill with backend awareness, clear communication, problem-solving, responsibility, and a continuous learning mindset.

metadata.title: Jivan Karlapudi | Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Jivan Karlapudi, a full-stack developer focused on React, JavaScript, Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, and MySQL.
